title: Create master documentation index for Tracks spoke
author: documentation-advisor
perceive: The Tracks spoke has multiple documentation surfaces (README, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG, prompts, spec, Skills/) but no central index. This makes it hard for engineers to understand the documentation landscape and identify gaps.
execute: 1. Create DOCUMENTATION.md at the root of the Tracks spoke
2. Index all documentation artifacts: path, purpose, audience, last-updated date, maintenance owner
3. Include categories: (a) User-facing (README, prompts), (b) Technical (ARCHITECTURE, spec, CHANGELOG), (c) Internal (Skills/, advisors/)
4. Add a maintenance schedule and responsibility matrix
verify: DOCUMENTATION.md exists and is complete; all doc artifacts are indexed with current metadata; engineers can quickly navigate the landscape
acceptance_criteria: DOCUMENTATION.md created at Tracks spoke root
All documentation artifacts indexed with: path, purpose, audience, last-updated date, maintenance owner
Categories clearly labeled: (a) User-facing, (b) Technical, (c) Internal
Maintenance schedule and responsibility matrix are defined
